overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a torch-lit temple complex at night. The character walks through an exterior courtyard, enters ornate interior corridors with high vaulted ceilings, and emerges onto a seaside balcony before returning to the main entrance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the stone courtyard toward the ornate pavilion structure

entered.detail: ornate stone pavilion with arched openings and decorative flame motifs on the roof
wet reflective stone pavement with geometric tile patterns
lit fire brazier providing warm orange illumination
large temple structure with tall arched windows and stone steps

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a torch-lit temple courtyard at night. Geralt walks across wet stone tiles toward an ornate central pavilion, with the main temple building visible to the left. The area is empty and quiet, illuminated by scattered fire braziers.

events.description: passes through the pavilion archway from exterior courtyard into the temple entrance hall
begins ascending the wide stone staircase toward the main temple doors

agents.ego_description: walking through the pavilion and climbing the grand staircase toward the temple entrance

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with multiple steps leading up to the temple entrance
large arched doorway with ornate stone carvings and columns
low stone wall with carved details lining the staircase

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the pavilion into a covered entrance area, then ascends a grand stone staircase flanked by ornate railings. The temple facade looms ahead with tall columns and arched doorways, lit by wall-mounted torches.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow temple corridor with red paneled walls

events.description: enters the narrow interior corridor with dark red paneled walls and vaulted ceilings
turns left to explore a side corridor with hanging lanterns

agents.ego_description: navigating the torch-lit interior corridors, examining the ornate architecture and turning to explore side passages

entered.detail: dark red wooden wall panels with gold trim and decorative moldings
high arched ceiling with intricate brickwork patterns
polished red marble tiles reflecting the torchlight
metal chandelier with multiple light sources suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Inside the temple, Geralt walks through narrow corridors with rich red paneled walls and high vaulted ceilings. The space is dimly lit by hanging lanterns and wall sconces, with polished marble floors reflecting the warm light. He turns to explore a side passage.

events.description: exits the temple interior onto an open balcony with view of the water
approaches a wooden door set into the stone wall on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the exterior balcony overlooking the sea, approaching a side door

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing by the wall holding a torch

entered.detail: low stone balustrade along the edge of the balcony overlooking the water
dark ocean horizon visible beyond the temple walls
heavy wooden door with iron studs set into the stone wall
small stone outbuilding with tiled roof attached to the main temple

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the temple onto an open balcony overlooking a dark sea. He walks along the stone walkway past a guard holding a torch, approaching a wooden side door. The night sky is visible above with the ocean stretching to the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior walkway leading to temple stairs

events.description: turns around and walks back toward the main temple entrance stairs

agents.ego_description: returning to the main temple entrance along the exterior walkway

entered.detail: stone staircase leading back up to the main temple entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns and walks back along the exterior walkway, returning toward the grand staircase of the temple. The stone railing now runs along the left side as he approaches the illuminated entrance, with the sea still visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, torch-lit temple courtyard into the ornate depths of the sanctuary before emerging onto a dark seaside balcony. It begins with Geralt walking across wet stone tiles toward a central pavilion, moving past scattered fire braziers toward the looming temple facade. As he ascends a grand stone staircase, the scene shifts from the open night air into narrow interior corridors characterized by rich red paneled walls, high vaulted ceilings, and polished marble floors. The camera then follows him as he exits the temple onto an open stone walkway overlooking a vast, dark sea under a night sky, passing a torch-bearing guard. Finally, the movement turns back along the exterior railing, retreating from the ocean horizon toward the illuminated grand staircase and the temple entrance.
